subject: ACTION: FB link discovery for 357 events + US city gap research
body:
Harvey,

Two tasks from Ybotman.

## TASK 1: Find FB links for 357 harvester events

Booker has 357 events from TangoMango (257) and NYTango (77) and other (23) with NO Facebook event links. Without FB links, we can't extract hosts/organizers.

These events are in fb_conditioner.sqlite with IDs like tm-26284 and nyt-nyt-nyc-2026-04-06-milonga-bienvenida.

Approach: Google search for each event:
  site:facebook.com/events "{title}" "{venue_name}"
  site:facebook.com/events "{title}" "{city}"

Priority order by US city (event count):
1. New York (61 events) — NYTango
2. San Diego (23) — TangoMango
3. San Francisco (21) — TangoMango
4. Chicago (20) — TangoMango
5. LA area (24 across Inglewood/Sherman Oaks/Irvine/Burbank) — TangoMango
6. Berkeley/San Jose (18) — TangoMango
7. Philadelphia (6) — TangoMango
8. South Florida (18 across Hallandale/Miami/etc) — TangoMango
9. Sacramento (5) — TangoMango

Output format — write to fb-conditioner/data/incoming/fb_links_{source}_YYYYMMDD.json:
{
  "source": "tangomango.org",
  "events": [{
    "source_id": "tm-26284",
    "title": "Milonga Tango Café",
    "venue": "By Your Side Dance Studio",
    "city": "Marina Del Rey",
    "fb_urls": ["https://www.facebook.com/events/123456/"],
    "match_confidence": "high"
  }]
}

Booker will pick these up and enrich via CDP.

## TASK 2: Find better FB groups for gapped US cities

30+ US cities have tango groups configured but found ZERO events. The groups exist but don't use FB Events feature. We need more active groups or alternative discovery.

Tier 1 gaps (known big tango scenes, zero events):
- Boston/Cambridge — 2 groups scraped, 0 events
- Portland OR — 2 groups scraped, 0 events
- Austin TX — 3 groups scraped, 0 events
- Dallas/FW — 2 groups scraped, 0 events
- Pittsburgh — 2 groups scraped, 0 events
- Phoenix — 1 group scraped, 0 events
- Nashville — 1 group scraped, 0 events
- Tampa — 1 group scraped, 0 events
- Baltimore — 1 group scraped, 0 events

Tier 2 (no groups configured at all):
- Las Vegas
- Raleigh/Durham NC
- San Juan PR

For each city, Google search:
  site:facebook.com/groups tango {city}
  site:facebook.com/groups milonga {city}
  site:facebook.com/groups "argentine tango" {city}

Look for groups that actually post FB Events (not just posts). Output as candidate_groups for Booker to import.

This is ongoing research — trickle pace is fine. Start with Tier 1.

— Booker
